## Summary

Three UI fixes:
1. **Landing page nav**: Add "Sign in" link (top-right) when user is not authenticated. Previously the nav showed nothing for anonymous visitors — now shows "Sign in" linking to `/login` on both desktop and mobile.
2. **Evaluate page — Select All + Delete Selected**: Each saved document now has a checkbox for multi-select. A "Select all" toggle and "Delete selected (N)" button appear in the header. Batch delete shows a confirmation dialog before permanently removing manuscripts.
3. **Evaluate page — Remove "Upload instead" button**: Removed from the saved documents section. Upload is still available via the Step 1 "Upload File" tab.

## Scope

**What this touches:**
- `components/HeaderNav.jsx` — added `authState === "anon"` Sign in link (desktop + mobile)
- `components/evaluation/ManuscriptSubmissionForm.jsx` — added multi-select state (`selectedDocIds`), `toggleSelectAll`, `toggleDocSelection`, `deleteSelectedManuscripts`; removed "Upload instead" button; added per-row checkbox

**What it does NOT touch:**
- Evaluation pipeline, scoring, exports, governance docs

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Batch delete calls `/api/manuscripts?id=` sequentially per document (not a bulk endpoint). For very large lists (50+) this could be slow — but users rarely have that many saved manuscripts.
- The "Upload instead" button removal is intentional per user request. Users can still upload via the "Upload File" tab.

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — UI-only changes, no evaluation pipeline logic affected
